mapper.select:
SELECT et.name AS type,
ev.name AS evaluatorName, ee.name AS evaluateeName,
i.start_at AS dueDate, cc.name AS status
FROM interview_52 i
JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = i.type
LEFT JOIN employee_52 ev ON ev.emp_no = i.evaluator_no
LEFT JOIN employee_52 ee ON ee.emp_no = i.evaluatee_no
JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(i.status AS VARCHAR) AND cc.group_id = ( SELECT id FROM code_group_52 WHERE group_code = 'INTERVIEW_STATUS' )
WHERE (i.evaluator_no = #{empNo} OR i.evaluatee_no = #{empNo}) AND i.status != 2
ORDER BY i.start_at ASC

SELECT et.name AS type,
ev.name AS evaluatorName, ee.name AS evaluateeName,
et.end_date AS dueDate, '완료 전' AS status
FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm
JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id
LEFT JOIN employee_52 ev ON ev.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no
LEFT JOIN employee_52 ee ON ee.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no
WHERE etm.evaluator_no = #{empNo} AND etm.status != 2
ORDER BY et.end_date ASC
SELECT TOP 6 type, title, created_at AS createdAt FROM notice_52 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT n.notice_id AS id, ec.name AS createBy, eu.name AS updateBy, n.type AS type, n.title AS title, n.content AS content, n.created_at AS createdAt, n.update_at AS updateAt
FROM notice_52 n
LEFT JOIN employee_52 ec ON n.create_by = ec.emp_no
LEFT JOIN employee_52 eu ON n.update_by = eu.emp_no
WHERE n.notice_id = #{id}
